problem: A school has 100 students. How many students do they have?
A factory has 50 workers. How many workers do they have?
A library has 200 books. How many books do they have?
A farm has 30 cows. How many cows do they have?
A bin has 40 cans of soda. How many cans do they have?
A shop has 25 bags of coffee. How many bags do they have?
A store has 60 bottles of water. How many bottles do they have?
In a building, there are 100 ladies. How many ladies do they have in total?
In a gym, there are 30 students. How many students do they have in total?
In a warehouse, there are 200 boxes. How many boxes do they have in total?
In a room, there are 15 chairs. How many chairs do they have in total?
In a building, there are a hundred ladies on the first-floor studying. How many ladies do they have in total?
In a library, there are 50 books on the second-floor shelving. How many books do they have in total?
In a warehouse, there are 200 boxes on the first-floor stacking. How many boxes do they have in total?

In a building, there are 50. How many ladies do they have?
A school has some students. How many students do they have?
